title: E-Commerce Store with Next.js
description: Complete route from zero to a production e-commerce store: product catalog, shopping cart, Stripe Checkout, customer auth, product image uploads, order confirmation emails, analytics, error monitoring, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Set up styling with Tailwind CSS v4
Install UI components for product cards, modals, and cart drawer
Set up database for products, orders, and customers
Integrate Stripe Checkout for payment processing and webhooks
Set up product image storage with S3 or Cloudflare R2
Send order confirmation and shipping notification emails
Track product views, add-to-cart events, and conversion funnel
Monitor checkout errors and payment failures in production
Test pricing calculations, discount logic, and cart utilities
Configure CI/CD pipeline with automated tests
